results.justification: EXACT TWIN — periodic phase reset/extension applied to RoPE rotation for long-context generalization is the direct functional twin of HAKA-PHASE-LOCK's anchor-based periodic re-grounding.
CRPA modifies RoPE index map so equal physical distances induce identical phases — functionally equivalent to anchor-position re-alignment to common reference rotor.
Hybrid layer pattern with periodic phase-anchoring layers covers the periodic re-grounding paradigm at the layer level.
Periodic anchor tokens with elevated attention coverage IS the anchor-token coherence paradigm proposed here.
Periodic synchronization tokens coordinating chunk interleaving cover the anchor-event collective coordination paradigm.
Parallel head groups encoding phase information for long-range alignment cover multi-head rotor coordination.

results.matched_effect_cluster: RoPE Lie algebra group action phase rotation
results.justification: Mathematical formalization of RoPE as group action covers the rotor-projection layer; HAKA-PHASE-LOCK fits within this framework.
Bi-directional RoPE with time+order rotation phases covers the multi-phase coordination paradigm at the multi-head level.
